title: MEMORY.md
excerpt:
# MEMORY.md

## Core setup state (as of 2026-03-09)
- Desktop is intended to be the primary OpenClaw machine.
- Laptop is intended to be secondary/client-only unless explicitly switched.
- OpenClaw is updated and back online.

## Important recent history
- 2026-03-04 to 2026-03-05 work focused on stabilizing OpenClaw, Telegram reliability, and cross-machine sync.
- Google Drive mirrors were used for workspace/full-profile sync (`G:\My Drive\openclaw-workspace-main` and `G:\My Drive\openclaw-full-main`).
- Browser relay was installed/configured and confirmed working on an attached Chrome tab.
- A major interruption occurred due to provider usage limits (ChatGPT plus limit), causing assistant responses to fail on 2026-03-05 evening.

## Operational preferences
- User prefers direct, high-energy, action-first help.
- User wants complete file/memory recovery after outages, with clear inventory and missing-items checks.

## Recovery artifacts present in workspace
- `memory/tonight-state-summary.md`
- `memory/full-history-dump.md`
- `memory/2026-03-05.md`
- `recovery-memory-export.json` (large export)
- Session transcripts in `C:\Users\tonyb\.openclaw\agents\main\sessions\`
